title: WE ARE AMONG THE VERY BEST FOUR IN TURKEY IN WEBOMETRIC RANKINGS

WE ARE AMONG THE VERY BEST FOUR IN TURKEY IN WEBOMETRIC RANKINGS

Dogus University ranked fourth in the 2018-2019 ranking of Webometrics. The list is prepared by taking into account a number of criteria such as the list of academic scientific resources on the Internet, information on the Internet, visibility, accessibility, convenience, and the number of visitors. Doğuş University once more proved its difference by keeping its rank intact.
